---
title: "Portland Metropolitan Area, Oregon"
subtitle: "2008, 2012, 2017, 2023"
number: 22
image: /images/skagit-wa.jpg
image-alt: "Image of Skagit County, Washington"
categories: ["Transfer/MRF/Transport", "Service Procurement"]
---

::: {.article}

# 2023 Service Agency Transfer Station Cost of Service Study

# 2019 Transfer Station Contractor Operator Procurement

# 2016 Transfer Station Cost of Service Study

# 2012 Transfer Station Repair & Replacement Study

# 2008 Transfer Station Repair & Replacement Study

TODO: Contents

:::
